id.description: The id of the created Payment.

created.description: The timestamp when the Payment was done.

updated.description: The timestamp when the Payment was last updated (will be updated when chat messages are received).

monetary_account_id.description: The id of the MonetaryAccount the Payment was made to or from (depending on whether this is an incoming or outgoing Payment).

amount.description: The Amount transferred by the Payment. Will be negative for outgoing Payments and positive for incoming Payments (relative to the MonetaryAccount indicated by monetary_account_id).

alias.description: The LabelMonetaryAccount containing the public information of 'this' (party) side of the Payment.

counterparty_alias.description: The LabelMonetaryAccount containing the public information of the other (counterparty) side of the Payment.

description.description: The description for the Payment. Maximum 140 characters for Payments to external IBANs, 9000 characters for Payments to only other bunq MonetaryAccounts.

type.description: The type of Payment, can be BUNQ, EBA_SCT, EBA_SDD, IDEAL, SWIFT or FIS (card).

sub_type.description: The sub-type of the Payment, can be PAYMENT, WITHDRAWAL, REVERSAL, REQUEST, BILLING, SCT, SDD or NLO.

bunqto_status.description: The status of the bunq.to payment.

bunqto_sub_status.description: The sub status of the bunq.to payment.

bunqto_share_url.description: The status of the bunq.to payment.

bunqto_expiry.description: When bunq.to payment is about to expire.

bunqto_time_responded.description: The timestamp of when the bunq.to payment was responded to.

attachment.description: The Attachments attached to the Payment.

merchant_reference.description: Optional data included with the Payment specific to the merchant.

batch_id.description: The id of the PaymentBatch if this Payment was part of one.

scheduled_id.description: The id of the JobScheduled if the Payment was scheduled.

address_shipping.description: A shipping Address provided with the Payment, currently unused.

address_billing.description: A billing Address provided with the Payment, currently unused.

geolocation.description: The Geolocation where the Payment was done from.

request_reference_split_the_bill.description: The reference to the object used for split the bill. Can be RequestInquiry or RequestInquiryBatch

balance_after_mutation.description: The new balance of the monetary account after the mutation.

payment_auto_allocate_instance.description: A reference to the PaymentAutoAllocateInstance if it exists.
